description: Never override; copies external_l1_max for this audit baseline.
Keep only v1 overrides with frontier_support >= 2.
Keep only v1 overrides with frontier_candidate_family_count >= 2.
Keep only v1 overrides with support_margin >= 2.
Keep only v1 overrides with maturity_margin >= 2.
Keep only v1 overrides when direct reserve attempts do not agree.
Require both two frontier branches and two families.
Blocks the higher-maturity harmful case; diagnostic only.
Do not override if the external_l1_max answer appears anywhere in the traced pool.
Recommended v2: multi-branch/multi-family frontier, weak direct reserve, and external incumbent absent from traced support.
